_comment: Per-agent default scope for the autopilot routines. CLI args to /autopilot-tick override these. To activate a change, commit + push to dev.
_format: Values are null (no scope) OR 'epic:FN-XXX' OR 'lane:<slug>'. Example: 'backend': 'epic:FN-1090' or 'frontend': 'lane:billing-redesign'.
_active_focus: Roadside AI v2 (epic:roadside-v2) — set 2026-06-10. Change when shifting focus to a new lane.
